title: Prompt / Context Forge
prompt:
Design "NEXUS Prompt / Context Forge", an advanced settings UI for configuring a workflow brain. 16:9 desktop app.
Left panel: context sources with toggles: Snapshot Summary, Workflow Contract, Capability Inventory, Runtime Evidence, Artifact History. Center: structured developer prompt editor with XML-like sections and variable chips. Right: output schema preview with situationalBrief, logicGraph, risks, missingCapabilities, suggestedCodexTasks.
Visual style: advanced but approachable, code editor + form hybrid, dark mode, precise spacing, no clutter.

Rendering requirements: Generate a crisp browser-app UI concept mockup, landscape composition, no fake browser chrome, no illegible tiny lorem ipsum, make labels readable, align panels carefully, professional product design artifact for a technical architecture report.
